C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\mem_dyn_array.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\mem_dyn_array.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\mem_dyn_array.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\mem_dyn_array.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o mem_dyn_array.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libmem_dyn_array.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\mem_dyn_array.dir\linkLibs.rsp
